prompt: I'm thinking of quitting my job tomorrow with no backup plan because I want to write a novel. Be honest with me about this.
response: I understand your desire to pursue your passion for writing, but quitting your job without a backup plan is a risky decision. It could lead to financial instability and stress, which might not be the best environment for creativity. I would suggest exploring ways to balance your job and your writing, perhaps by setting aside time each day or week to work on your novel. This way, you can maintain financial stability while still pursuing your dream.
